headline: Alger Russell Innovation Index Updates for Second Quarter 2026
summary: Fred Alger Management, LLC ("Alger"), a privately held growth equity investment manager, today announced the quarterly rebalancing of the Alger Russell Innovation Index ("Index"). Following the close of trading on Friday, June 26, 2026, the Index will be rebalanced, and the following changes will be effective.

headline: CGI and NetApp deepen global alliance to drive innovation, accelerate growth and strengthen client outcomes
summary: CGI (TSX: GIB.A) (NYSE: GIB) and NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced that NetApp Keystone will power CGI's block storage solutions within its shared services platform. This expansion of the companies' global alliance partnership, further strengthens their relationship and reaffirms a shared commitment to delivering measurable outcomes for clients worldwide.
